_comment:
Pool of stickers and media Clawy can attach. Three types:
  sticker: needs sticker_id (Discord sticker, get id by right-click → Copy ID in dev mode)
  file:    needs path (absolute or relative to project root)
  url:     needs url (will be fetched and posted; capped at 8 MB)
Descriptions are what the LLM reads — write them as a vibe/use-case, not literal contents.

shrug_video.description: comedic shrug — when feigning ignorance or dismissing a complaint

hellfire_gif.description: demonic fire — for intense agreement, threats, or savage moments

sticker_skull.description: skull sticker — for when something is dead/over/savage (replace sticker_id with a real one from your server)

polite_clap.description: slow sarcastic clapping — when someone says something obvious or unimpressive
